---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that is broken or behaving unexpectedly
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: ["bug"]
assignees: []
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Enter '...'
4. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened.

## Screenshots / logs

If applicable, add screenshots or relevant log output.
**Do not paste secrets, API keys, tokens, or full transcripts.**

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Node version: [e.g. 20.x]
- Browser (if UI): [e.g. Chrome 124]
- AI services configured: [Azure OpenAI / Azure AI Search / none]
- Worker running: [yes / no]
- Commit or branch: [e.g. main @ abc1234]

## Possible fix

(Optional) If you have an idea of the cause or a suggested fix, describe it here.
